title: halotis pilosa
intro: Halotis pilosa, also known as the sticky bean or climbing bean, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Halotis pilosa include the treatment of wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as the relief of pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Halotis pilosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
